workflow.name: Apache Pulsar HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Apache Pulsar HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Apache Pulsar inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/apache_pulsar-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[apache_pulsar]
10.31.101.11 role=pulsar name=apache-pulsar-01
10.31.101.12 role=pulsar name=apache-pulsar-02
10.31.101.13 role=pulsar name=apache-pulsar-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Apache Pulsar container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/apache_pulsar-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: apache_pulsar
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/apache_pulsar-inventory.ini /tmp/apache_pulsar-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Apache Pulsar cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/apache_pulsar-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: apache_pulsar
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/apache_pulsar
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/apache_pulsar/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            pulsar:
              image: apachepulsar/pulsar:3.3.0
              container_name: octastack-pulsar
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "bin/pulsar standalone"
              ports:
                - "6650:6650"
                - "8080:8080"
              volumes:
                - data:/pulsar/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Apache Pulsar cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/apache_pulsar-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/apache_pulsar/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/apache_pulsar/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/apache_pulsar/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/apache_pulsar-inventory.ini /tmp/apache_pulsar-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Apache Pulsar topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/apache_pulsar-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Apache Pulsar HA topology

Members:
- apache-pulsar-01: 10.31.101.11 (pulsar)
- apache-pulsar-02: 10.31.101.12 (pulsar)
- apache-pulsar-03: 10.31.101.13 (pulsar)

This example deploys one Apache Pulsar container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/apache_pulsar-topology.md

data.label: Validate Apache Pulsar cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/apache_pulsar-inventory.ini apache_pulsar -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
